initialValue:
name: CI
on: [push]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'
      - run: pip install -r requirements.txt
      - run: python -m pytest

expected.label: system dependency step updates apt metadata
system dependency step installs an apt package
